pi_items.source: Calculation: 1 hour × 60 min/hour × 60 sec/min = 3600 seconds. Verified against Magento 2.4.7 official documentation confirming web/cookie/cookie_lifetime is stored in seconds.

Calculation: 30 days × 24 hours/day × 60 min/hour × 60 sec/min = 2,592,000 seconds. Verified against Magento 2.4.7 official documentation and multiple sources confirming persistent/options/lifetime is stored in seconds with 30 days = 2,592,000 seconds.

Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path through multiple sources: Magento developer documentation, BSScommerce, Amasty, and official Adobe Commerce documentation. This path stores cookie lifetime in seconds.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path for enabling/disabling persistent shopping cart. Confirmed through Magento official documentation and multiple third-party Magento guides.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path. Confirmed through Amasty, Mageplaza, Magezon documentation and official Adobe Commerce persistent shopping cart documentation.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path for enabling 'Remember Me' feature. Confirmed through multiple Magento community guides and setup documentation.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path for setting 'Remember Me' default value. Confirmed through Magento persistent shopping cart configuration guides.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path for 'Clear Persistence on Sign Out' setting. Confirmed through official Adobe Commerce and community documentation.
Verified as valid Magento 2.4.7 configuration path for 'Persist Shopping Cart' setting. Confirmed through Adobe Commerce official documentation and setup guides.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Magento 2.4.7 (real open-source e-commerce software, not synthetic). Cookie Lifetime is correctly set to 3600 seconds (1 hour). Persistence Lifetime is correctly set to 2,592,000 seconds (30 days). All configuration paths (web/cookie/cookie_lifetime, persistent/options/*) are verified as authentic Magento 2.4.7 configuration paths documented in official Adobe Commerce and community sources.
